00019  ***************************************************************************/
00020 
00025 #include "wrappers.h"
00026 
00027 #include "vm.h"
00028 #include "memory.h"
00029 #include "utf8_string.h"
00030 
00031 /******************************************************************************
00032  * Local function declarations                                                *
00033  ******************************************************************************/
00034 
00035 static void parse_command_line_args(int, char *[]);
00036 
00041 int main(int argc, char *argv[])
00042 {
00043     int jargs_n;
00044     char **jargs;
00045 
00046     parse_command_line_args(argc, argv);
00047 
00048     if (opts_get_version()) {
00049         printf("%s\n", PACKAGE_STRING);
00050     } else if (opts_get_help() || argc == 1 || opts_get_main_class() == NULL) {
00051         printf("Usage: jelatine [OPTIONS]... CLASSNAME [ARGUMENTS]...\n"
00052                "\n"
00053                "where options include:\n"
00054                "    -b, --bootclasspath <single directory or JAR>\n"
00055                "    -c, --classpath <colon separated list of directories and JARs>\n"
00056                "    -s, --size <size of the heap in bytes>\n"
00057                "    --stack-size <size of a thread's stack in bytes>\n"
00058                "\n"
00059                "    -h, --help      display this help and exit\n"
00060                "    --version       output version information and exit\n"
00061  #if JEL_TRACE
00062                "\n"
00063                "    --trace-methods trace method invocations\n"
00064                "    --trace-opcodes trace opcode execution\n"
00065 #endif // JEL_TRACE
00066 #if JEL_PRINT
00067                "\n"
00068                "    --print-methods print method invocations\n"
00069                "    --print-opcodes print opcode execution\n"
00070                "    --print-memory print memory operations\n"
00071 #endif // JEL_PRINT
00072             );
00073     } else {
00074         jargs = opts_get_jargs();
00075 
00076         if (jargs != NULL) {
00077             jargs_n = 0;
00078 
00079             while (jargs[jargs_n] != NULL) {
00080                 jargs_n++;
00081             }
00082 
00083             opts_set_jargs_n(jargs_n);
00084         } else {
00085             opts_set_jargs_n(0);
00086         }
00087 
00088         vm_run();
00089     }
00090 
00091     exit(0);
00092 } // main()
00093 
00099 static void parse_command_line_args(int argc, char *argv[])
00100 {
00101     int i = 1;
00102 
00103     while (i < argc) {
00104         if (((strcmp("-c", argv[i]) == 0)
00105              || (strcmp("--classpath", argv[i]) == 0))
00106             && (i + 1 < argc))
00107 
00108         {
00109             opts_set_classpath(argv[i + 1]);
00110             i += 2;
00111         } else if (((strcmp("-b", argv[i]) == 0)
00112                     || (strcmp("--bootclasspath", argv[i]) == 0))
00113                    && (i + 1 < argc))
00114         {
00115             opts_set_boot_classpath(argv[i + 1]);
00116             i += 2;
00117         } else if (((strcmp("-s", argv[i]) == 0)
00118                     || (strcmp("--size", argv[i]) == 0))
00119                    && (i + 1 < argc))
00120         {
00121             opts_set_heap_size(atoi(argv[i + 1]));
00122             i += 2;
00123         } else if ((strcmp("--stack-size", argv[i]) == 0) && (i + 1 < argc)) {
00124             size_t stack_size = atoi(argv[i + 1]);
00125 
00126             opts_set_stack_size(size_ceil(stack_size, sizeof(jword_t)));
00127             i += 2;
00128         } else if ((strcmp("-h", argv[i]) == 0)
00129                    || (strcmp("--help", argv[i]) == 0))
00130         {
00131             opts_set_help(true);
00132             i++;
00133         } else if (strcmp("--version", argv[i]) == 0) {
00134             opts_set_version(true);
00135             i++;
00136 #if JEL_PRINT
00137         } else if (strcmp("--print-opcodes", argv[i]) == 0) {
00138             opts_set_print_opcodes(true);
00139             i++;
00140         } else if (strcmp("--print-methods", argv[i]) == 0) {
00141             opts_set_print_methods(true);
00142             i++;
00143         } else if (strcmp("--print-memory", argv[i]) == 0) {
00144             opts_set_print_memory(true);
00145             i++;
00146 #endif // JEL_PRINT
00147 #if JEL_TRACE
00148         } else if (strcmp("--trace-opcodes", argv[i]) == 0) {
00149             opts_set_trace_opcodes(true);
00150             i++;
00151         } else if (strcmp("--trace-methods", argv[i]) == 0) {
00152             opts_set_trace_methods(true);
00153             i++;
00154 #endif // JEL_TRACE
00155         } else {
00156             break; // Move to the class-name
00157         }
00158     }
00159 
00160     if (i < argc) {
00161         opts_set_main_class(utf8_slashify(argv[i]));
00162         i++;
00163 
00164         if (i < argc) {
00165             opts_set_jargs_n(i - argc);
00166             opts_set_jargs(argv + i);
00167         }
00168     }
00169 } // parse_command_line_args()
00170
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:26 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
